---
name: Bug report
about: Something broke or produced wrong output
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened?**
Describe what went wrong. Include the command you ran.

**What did you expect?**
What should have happened instead?

**Environment**
- Install method: [plugin / legacy skill / Cowork]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.x.x]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]

**Decision Brief output (if applicable)**
Paste or attach the relevant section of the brief, or the full `~/.autodecision/runs/{slug}/` directory listing.

**Logs**
Any error messages or unexpected output from the conversation.
